prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第68名持续上升至2026年第61名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力获认可；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议（中性事件为主）；抖音热度排名第38（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录。 心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出；该校在农学、生物学等领域也有较强积累，与物理类招生专业中的植物生产类、动物医学类等形 成学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业中的计算机科学与技术、人工智能、电气工 程及其自动化等高度契合，相关专业报考热度高；本省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，物理类估算约31.3万，较2025年32.08万略有减少。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 31405 → 31113 → 30160 → 27592 → 31455. In 2024, it moved forward to 27592, but in 2025 it fell back to 31455. Over the past five years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 50 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 31455 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 57 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 64 students, a significant increase of about 64% compared to 2025, indicating a substantial expansion and a notable easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement and recognition of its comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to disputes over food delivery management (mostly neutral incidents). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. No significant admission gaps or discontinuities have been observed. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-) highlight its strong teacher-training disciplines. The university also has solid accumulations in agriculture, biology, and other fields, providing disciplinary support for Physics Category majors such as Plant Production and Animal Medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular and recommended. These align well with the Physics Category enrollment majors at this university, including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, leading to high application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the provincial general college entrance examination is approximately 451,000, with an estimated 313,000 in the Physics Category, a slight decrease from 320,800 in 2025.
7. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the significant enrollment expansion (64%) for Physics Category in 2026, a slight decrease in the number of provincial Physics Category candidates, and the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, the ranking is expected to shift backward (easing competition) based on the 2025 baseline of 31,455. However, the high popularity of engineering majors will partially offset this backward shift. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 43,054, with a range of 42,554 to 43,554.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation
- Information Security
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Vehicle Engineering, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering)
- Materials (including Materials Physics, Metal Materials Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Food Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Plant Production (including Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection)
- Animal Science (Rongchang Campus)
- Aquaculture (Rongchang Campus)
- Animal Medicine (Rongchang Campus) (five-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (42,554–43,554), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 42,000), you can prioritize popular engineering majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information.
